basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jhajjar Project Technical Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jhajjar (AIIMS Jhajjar)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jhajjar (AIIMS Jhajjar) Project Technical Staff Notification 2026 has been released on 08 June 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Jhajjar. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Jhajjar Project Technical Staff Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: Relaxation as per AIIMS/ICMR rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum of three-year graduate degree in a relevant field + 3 years of post-qualification experience, OR Postgraduate degree in the relevant subject/field, 10th Pass + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/ITI or equivalent) + 2 years of experience in the relevant subject/field, OR Three-year Graduate Degree in a relevant subject/field + 1 year of experience in the relevant subject/field
qualification.details: Project Technical Staff III: Minimum of three-year graduate degree in a relevant field + 3 years of post-qualification experience, OR Postgraduate degree in the relevant subject/field. Project Technical Staff I: 10th Pass + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/ITI or equivalent) + 2 years of experience in the relevant subject/field, OR Three-year Graduate Degree in a relevant subject/field + 1 year of experience in the relevant subject/field.

salary_details.details: Project Technical Staff III: Rs. 36,400 Consolidated Project Technical Staff I: Rs. 23,400 Consolidated

selection_process: Shortlisting via Google Form Offline Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Jhajjar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Jhajjar Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Jhajjar Project Technical Staff posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the AIIMS Jhajjar Project Technical Staff recruitment is 23rd June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Technical Staff at AIIMS Jhajjar?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Project Technical Staff position at AIIMS Jhajjar. These are distributed across two different levels of Project Technical Staff.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Technical Staff I?
faq.answer: For Project Technical Staff I, candidates need to have passed 10th grade along with a Diploma (MLT/DMLT/ITI or equivalent) and possess 2 years of relevant experience. Alternatively, a three-year Graduate Degree in a relevant field with 1 year of experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Technical Staff positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Technical Staff positions at AIIMS Jhajjar is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per AIIMS/ICMR rules.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Staff positions?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for Project Technical Staff III is Rs. 36,400, and for Project Technical Staff I, it is Rs. 23,400. These are consolidated monthly payments.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two stages: initial shortlisting of candidates via a Google Form, followed by an offline interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Project Technical Staff at AIIMS Jhajjar are on a contract basis. This means the employment is for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of AIIMS Jhajjar?
faq.answer: AIIMS Jhajjar is located in Jhajjar, Haryana. Candidates applying for these positions should be willing to work in this location.
